scripts.check: node --check src/m3-slider.js && node --check src/m3-button.js && node --check src/m3-tabs.js && node --check src/m3-panel-stack.js && node --check dist/lovelace-m3-core-cards.js
scripts.test: npm run test:dist && npm run test:unit
scripts.validate: npm run build && npm run check && npm test
